channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Cooling agents in e-cigarettes linked to irregular heartbeat and cardiac arrest risk
item.description: Synthetic cooling ingredients in e-cigarettes caused abnormal heart rhythms and increased cardiovascular risk in mice and laboratory studies.

item.title: Pain's burden: Frailty risk rises for childhood cancer survivors
item.description: Pain that interferes with daily life is linked to higher odds of frailty and its progression in adult survivors of childhood cancer.

item.title: Collaborative effort aims to improve hidradenitis suppurativa diagnosis
item.description: The AAD partners with dermatology experts and an AI company to raise awareness, improve differential diagnosis, and shorten time to HS diagnosis.

item.title: EMA restricts chikungunya vaccine after serious safety review
item.description: European regulators limited the chikungunya vaccine Ixchiq after reports of serious adverse events, including neurologic issues and deaths.
